case_title: VELASCO, DONNA E. VS ARABIA, SILVIA E.

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF VELASCO, DONNA E.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VELASCO, DONNA E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARABIA, SILVIA E. $3,930.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,976.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ARABIA, SILVIA E. HEARING SET FOR JUL-21-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REM: LTR TO COURT BY DEFT, ARABIA,VIA MESSENGER DELIVERED IN COURT @ 01:30PM. RE:MONTHLY PYMT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY VELASCO, DONNA E. AS TO DEFENDANT ARABIA, SILVIA E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM DEFT RE: TEMPORARY INABILITY TO PAY INSTALLMENTS
CORRESPONDENCE FROM JUDGMENT DEBTOR RE SET ASIDE ORDER FILED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ARABIA, SILVIA E.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF JUL-21-1999, GRANTED
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VELASCO, DONNA E. PETITION MAILED ON FEB 01, 2002
